titles.title: In Christ alone my hope is found

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: In Christ alone my hope is found He is my light, my strength, my song This corner stone, this solid ground Firm through the fiercest drought and storm What heights of love, what depths of peace When fears are stilled, when strivings cease My comforter, my all in all Here in the love of Christ I stand

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: There in the ground His body lay Light of the world by darkness slain Then bursting forth in glorious day Up from the grave He rose again And as He stands in victory Sin's curse has lost its grip on me For I am His and He is mine Bought with the precious blood of Christ

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: No guilt in life, no fear in death This is the pow'r of Christ in me From life's first cry to final breath Jesus commands my destiny No pow'r of hell, no scheme of man Can ever pluck me from His hand 'til He returns or calls me home Fere in the pow'r of Christ I'll stand

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I find my strength, I find my hope I find my help in Christ alone When fear assails, when darkness falls I find my peace in Christ alone I give my life, I give my all I sing my song to Christ alone The King of kings, the Lord I love All heaven sings to Christ alone

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: 'til He returns or calls me home Here in the power of Christ I'll stand Here in the power of Christ we stand
